answer:
The provided emails are all from and to pete.davis@enron.com, with the subject "schedule crawler: hourahead failure". Each email reports that the "HourAhead schedule download failed" and requires "Manual intervention" [msg: <17498842.1075841288916.JavaMail.evans@thyme>], [msg: <13643785.1075841314305.JavaMail.evans@thyme>], [msg: <22253457.1075841314453.JavaMail.evans@thyme>], [msg: <8488660.1075841314658.JavaMail.evans@thyme>], [msg: <12399608.1075841291359.JavaMail.evans@thyme>].

These failures occurred on several dates and hours: January 2, 2002, at hours 4, 10, and 13; February 2, 2002, at hour 17; and February 6, 2002, at hour 10 [msg: <8488660.1075841314658.JavaMail.evans@thyme>], [msg: <22253457.1075841314453.JavaMail.evans@thyme>], [msg: <13643785.1075841314305.JavaMail.evans@thyme>], [msg: <12399608.1075841291359.JavaMail.evans@thyme>], [msg: <17498842.1075841288916.JavaMail.evans@thyme>].
